FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Geopolitical Stalemate and Policy Divergence Sustain Structural Bid
tldr_points: US-Iran stalemate reinforces safe-haven USD structural bid versus JPY
SNB policy flexibility and weak EUR/CHF data underscore G10 FX volatility skew favoring USD
Technicals track grind toward 160.00 handle with contained JPY volatility
FX.excerpt: Geopolitical inertia and SNB flexibility sustain USD/JPY grind toward 160.00; tactical longs favored on pullbacks.
FX.comment: Geopolitical inertia and SNB flexibility sustain grind toward 160.00 with upside skew on break.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Bullish Momentum from Big Tech Earnings and Oil Strength
tldr_points: Big tech earnings driving optimism, oil remains supportive.
Inflation data benign, Fed stance steady, supporting risk assets.
Technical setup shows price near MA20 with RSI indicating room to rise.
STOCKS.excerpt: Markets buoyed by strong tech earnings and steady oil; bias toward upside with defined risk.
STOCKS.comment: Bullish bias driven by strong tech earnings, steady rates, and technical support at MA20.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Spot bitcoin ETFs draw $2 billion in net inflows over 8-day positive streak
Mantle proposes up to 30,000 ETH loan to address Aave bad debt
Metaplanet issues $50 million in zero-interest bonds to buy more bitcoin
CRYPTO.excerpt: Spot bitcoin ETFs drive inflows; Mantle and Metaplanet bolster BTC with new funding
CRYPTO.comment: AI detects support at MA20 as funds flow into bitcoin ETFs
